repositories.name: act_inf_metaanalysis
repositories.description: A computational meta-analysis of the Active Inference literature. An automated LLM pipeline extracts assertions from 849 papers across theory, tools, and domains, structuring them as nanopublications. By mapping these into a citation-weighted knowledge graph, this project provides a reproducible, living review of hypothesis-level consensus.
